ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country ID of the artist */,
  "monthly_listeners" INTEGER /* Number of monthly listeners */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Peak position on the chart */,
  "peak_date" TEXT /* Date when the peak position was achieved */,
  "current_weekly_streak" INTEGER /* Current weekly streak on the chart */,
  "internal_link" TEXT /* Internal link to the artist's profile */,
  "genre_ids" TEXT /* List of genre IDs to categorize artists */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label associated with the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist's profile was last updated */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "total_streams" TEXT /* Total number of streams for the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the country entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the country entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listener_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listener statistic */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "monthly_listeners" INTEGER /* Number of monthly listeners */,
  "weekly_listeners_change" INTEGER /* Change in weekly listeners */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the listener is based */,
  "daily_listeners" INTEGER /* Number of daily listeners */,
  "listeners_by_age_group" TEXT /* JSON object containing listener counts by age group */,
  "listeners_by_gender" TEXT /* JSON object containing listener counts by gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the listener statistic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the listener statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listener_stats_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listener_stats_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart position */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank on the chart */,
  "change" INTEGER /* Change in rank since the last week */,
  "weeks_on_chart" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the artist has been on the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart position was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chart position was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chart position was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_positions_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internal link */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "internal_link" TEXT /* Internal link to the artist's profile */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_links_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaks" (
  "streak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streak */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "current_weekly_streak" INTEGER /* Current weekly streak on the chart */,
  "streak_type" TEXT /* Type of streak */,
  "streak_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the streak started */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the streak was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the streak was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("streak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
